I'll start by reading the relevant files to understand the project structure and instructions.  The project is already fully bootstrapped with a complete `project-memory.md`, all 6 test cases in `actualtestcases.csv`, and a working `homepage.spec.ts`. Let me now produce the `specs/test-strategy.md` for this run based on the attached design image and existing verified state. Now update `project-memory.md` to reflect this run's design source: ## Context Analyst — Completed ✅

Here is the full analysis for the **`example-good`** project. Everything was derived from the **attached design image** (source of truth) + existing project artefacts. No live app was navigated.

---

### §0 — Scope
Only **Functional / E2E** tests requested this run. Visual / Design Parity and all other categories are deferred.

---

### §1 — Environment
| Variable | Value |
|---|---|
| `TEST_URL` | `https://example.com` |
| Auth | ❌ None — public page |

---

### §2 — Design source of truth (attached image)
The single attached PNG was read directly. The following **verified design tokens** were extracted:

| Token | Verified value |
|---|---|
| Page background | Light grey ~`#f0f0f2` |
| Heading | **`"Example Domain"`** — bold, dark charcoal |
| Paragraph (line 1) | `"This domain is for use in documentation examples without needing permission."` |
| Paragraph (line 2) | `"Avoid use in operations."` |
| Link label | `"Learn more"` — muted blue/indigo, underlined, below paragraph |

---

### §3 — Business Rules
| ID | Rule |
|---|---|
| BR-001 | Heading + title MUST read `"Example Domain"` |
| BR-002 | Paragraph MUST contain the documentation-examples sentence |
| BR-003 | Paragraph MUST contain `"Avoid use in operations."` |
| BR-004 | `"Learn more"` link MUST be visible with a valid absolute `href` |
| BR-005 | *(Visual — deferred)* Background MUST be `#f0f0f2` |

---

### §4 — Test Cases (Functional / E2E)
| TC | Summary | BR |
|---|---|---|
| TC-001 | HTTP 200 + title contains `"Example Domain"` | BR-001 |
| TC-002 | H1 exact text `"Example Domain"` | BR-001 |
| TC-003 | Paragraph contains first sentence | BR-002 |
| TC-004 | Paragraph contains `"Avoid use in operations."` | BR-003 |
| TC-005 | `"Learn more"` link is visible | BR-004 |
| TC-006 | `"Learn more"` href is a valid absolute URL | BR-004 |

All 6 test cases are already implemented in `tests/homepage.spec.ts` and previously passed (2.8 s, all green — recorded in `project-memory.md §7`).
